headline: International Paper to acquire North Pacific Paper Co. for $360M
summary: IP says Norpac’s paper mill in the Pacific Northwest will complement its existing system as part of the company’s strategic transformation.

raw.headline: International Paper to acquire North Pacific Paper Co. for $360M

headline: International Paper to acquire North Pacific Paper Company for $360m
summary: The acquired entity runs a paper mill in Longview, Washington, US.

raw.headline: International Paper to acquire North Pacific Paper Company for $360m
raw.summary: The acquired entity runs a paper mill in Longview, Washington, US.
